summary: R2 systems review accepts commit 3fcdb724f630f6cf498df26cc3f65729fe029306. The QA-blocking locale-family defect is fixed: en and en-* canonicalize to en-US, while zh and zh-* canonicalize to zh-CN for the current M7 client i18n supported surface. Persisted regional locale preferences are migrated to the canonical supported preference set, and localStorage getItem/setItem failures no longer block Web shell boot. This remains a client-only locale preference/display concern in @monsoon/ui and apps/web shell code. No sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, map-renderer, Electron IPC/preload, dependency manifest, save schema, ADR, or product-scope boundary changed.

tests_run.result: Worktree was clean before this systems R2 handoff was written.

R2 commit changes are limited to apps/web/src/shell/i18n-platform.ts, apps/web/src/shell/web-client-shell.test.tsx, packages/ui/src/i18n.ts, packages/ui/src/index.tsx, tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx, and the R2 writer handoff.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only 0ae7ab4ac983360b31c7592f82066c6320679669 3fcdb724f630f6cf498df26cc3f65729fe029306 -- packages/sim-core packages/sim-ai packages/protocol packages/save-format packages/map-renderer apps/desktop package.json pnpm-lock.yaml docs/decisions tools .github
tests_run.result: No forbidden architecture, Electron, dependency, tool, ADR, or CI paths changed across the R2 repair range.
Vitest passed: 1 file, 13 tests. R2 coverage includes en, en-GB, zh-Hans, zh-TW, zh-HK, zh-Hans-HK, en-GB-before-zh-Hans ordering, and read-model/hash immutability.
Vitest passed: 1 file, 7 tests. R2 coverage includes persisted en-GB/zh-Hans/zh-TW migration, zh-HK and zh-Hans-HK system fallback, and localStorage getItem/setItem failure handling.
Electron security check passed. Preload still exposes only monsoonDesktop; allowed IPC channels remain desktop:getRuntimeInfo and desktop:setFullscreen.
Playwright passed: 14/14, including system language fallback, manual language switch, persisted preference reload, document.lang, no visible raw reason key in the covered path, and core UI flows.
Format check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary check passed.
M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 remains REVIEW. Ready candidates remain M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001; this review starts no downstream task.

decisions.decision: Accept en/en-* -> en-US and zh/zh-* -> zh-CN for the current M7 i18n foundation because the supported locale set is exactly system, en-US, and zh-CN, and the product directive requires stable Simplified Chinese behavior before downstream localized UI polish.

Classify the R2 canonicalization policy as client-only locale preference/display behavior. It is not a simulation rule, protocol field, save payload field, map authority input, AI behavior input, or product-scope expansion.
Accept persisted regional values such as en-GB, zh-Hans, zh-TW, zh-HK, and zh-Hans-HK being parsed and rewritten to canonical supported preferences through localStorage only.

No additional security_reviewer handoff is required for R2 because Electron main/preload/security code and IPC channel definitions are unchanged; desktop locale still comes only through the existing runtime-info bridge.
No ADR, save migration, schema update, dependency review, or Human Gate is required because R2 corrects client locale negotiation inside the already accepted i18n foundation boundary.

risks.summary: Mapping all zh-* system tags to zh-CN is correct for the current supported locale surface, but it must not be interpreted as completed Traditional Chinese, regional Chinese, or culture-specific language support.
risks.mitigation: Any future zh-Hant, zh-TW, zh-HK, or additional locale support must come through a separate approved task or Human Gate before changing the supported locale set.

risks.summary: R2 fixes locale-family negotiation and safe persistence only. Full player-mode text cleanup and broader no-bare-key/no-debug-string coverage remain outside this repair.
risks.mitigation: Keep M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001, M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001, M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001, M7-APPOINTMENT-FLOW-QUALITY-001, M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001, M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001, and M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 responsible for final UI/localization coverage.

requested_action: Run independent R2 QA verification of the locale-family canonicalization fix, especially en/en-* -> en-US, zh/zh-* -> zh-CN, persisted preference migration, safe storage failure behavior, and confirmation that the repair remains client-only with no simulation/protocol/save/map/Electron/dependency boundary change.
